calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Entry of Judgment. No appearance by or on behalf of defendant(s)
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brndon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(s)GREGORY W. HARDING.
Declaration of Maria Marin pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Damages $7,039.42
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $280.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $7,319.42
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-04-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Set For Trial On May-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
